howItWorks.intro: This cat food calculator uses standard formulas to provide accurate results.
rules: Daily Calories = RER × Life Stage Factor
howItWorks.outro: Results are estimates based on standard formulas. Verify with current local data for your specific situation.

faq.question: How many calories does a cat need?
faq.answer: Average indoor adult cat: 200-250 calories/day. Active cats may need 300+. Kittens need more calories per pound for growth.

faq.question: Wet vs dry food?
faq.answer: Wet food provides hydration (important for cats who do not drink enough water) and is typically lower in carbs. Dry food is convenient and helps dental health. A mix is ideal.

faq.question: How often should I feed my cat?
faq.answer: Adult cats: 2 meals per day or measured free-feeding. Kittens: 3-4 meals per day. Avoid unlimited free-feeding as it leads to obesity.

faq.question: Is my cat overweight?
faq.answer: Over 50% of US cats are overweight. A healthy cat has a visible waist, you can feel ribs without pressing hard, and has minimal belly pouch.

faq.question: Is the Cat Food Calculator free to use?
faq.answer: Yes, completely free with no signup required. Use it as many times as you need — there are no limits or hidden fees.

sections.title: What Is the Cat Food Calculator?
sections.body: The Cat Food Calculator is a free online tool designed for users who need quick, accurate calculations in the practical calculation space. By entering your cat weight, activity, age, you get instant results including daily calories, wet food, dry food. No formulas to memorize, no spreadsheets to build — just enter your numbers and get the answer in seconds. Whether you're a beginner or experienced professional, this calculator saves you time and eliminates guesswork.

sections.title: Why This Calculation Matters
sections.body: Getting daily calories right can make the difference between success and costly mistakes. In practical calculation, small errors compound quickly. Manual calculations are error-prone and time-consuming, especially under pressure. This calculator applies proven formulas used by users worldwide, giving you confidence that your numbers are correct. Use it to get accurate results with precision and avoid common pitfalls that trip up beginners.

sections.title: When Should You Use This Calculator?
sections.body: This tool is most useful when you know your cat weight and need to find the right daily calories. It's also great for quick estimates before committing to a decision, and to double-check manual calculations or professional quotes, and when comparing different scenarios side by side. Bookmark this page and come back whenever you need a fast, reliable answer — the calculator is always free and requires no signup.
